en.text: a primitive root; also denominative from H5275 properly, to fasten up, i.e. with abar or cord; hence, to sandal, i.e. furnish with slippers

senses.gloss_en: a primitive root; also denominative from H5275 properly, to fasten up, i.e. with abar or cord; hence, to sandal, i.e. furnish with slippers
